title: Onboarding - Welcome to Poly Studio - Fresh install
scenario: Welcome to Poly Studio onboarding screen appears on fresh install and tapping Get Started returns user to Organized screen
steps: 1. Fresh install the Poly Studio Mobile app on an Android device.
3. Observe the initial screen that appears.
4. Tap the "Get Started" button on the "Welcome to Poly Studio" screen.
5. Observe the screen that appears after tapping "Get Started".
expected: The "Welcome to Poly Studio" screen appears on fresh install. After tapping "Get Started", the user is returned to the "Organized" screen to continue onboarding.
